function.name: _i18n_save_define_designer
function.description: Save internationalization translation definitions. Used to maintain multi-language translation structure and content within the application

translateList.description: Internationalization translation list (supports grouping and multi-level structure)

Translate.description: Internationalization translation item or translation group

id.description: Translation item ID, 16-digit lowercase English random string, e.g., dcukarpyabqke, cannot be duplicated

isDirectory.description: Whether it is a group directory

content.description: Translation content, key is language ID, value is translation text in the corresponding language
